jsonLd.title: Zepto is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a E-commerce Executive in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!
